name: Container Scan Quality Gate
description: CI/CD quality gate for container image scanning. When a container image scan completes, Riggs AI evaluates the findings and enforces a security gate: images with critical vulnerabilities are blocked from deployment, high-severity findings trigger a review workflow, and clean images are approved for promotion to production.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tickets for container vulnerabilities that block deployment

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify DevOps and security teams about blocked or flagged container images

data.title: Container Scan Completed
data.summary: Triggers when a container image scan completes in the CI/CD pipeline

config.description: Ingests container image scan results from Trivy, Grype, Snyk Container, or Aqua Security

data.title: AI Container Risk Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates the container scan findings and overall image risk

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate the container image scan results: count critical/high/medium/low CVEs, check for known exploited vulnerabilities, assess base image age, and identify fixable vs. unfixable vulnerabilities. Provide a pass/fail recommendation for the deployment gate.
config.description: AI-powered container image risk assessment for deployment gate decision

data.title: Any Critical Vulnerabilities?
data.summary: Check if the scan found critical-severity vulnerabilities

data.title: Block Deployment
data.summary: Block the container image from being promoted to production

config.message: DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: Container image {{trigger-1.alert.image_name}}:{{trigger-1.alert.image_tag}} contains {{analyze-1.result.critical_count}} critical vulnerabilities. Image must be remediated before deployment.
config.description: Block the container image deployment due to critical vulnerabilities

data.title: Create Block Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket documenting the blocked deployment

config.description: Create a P1 Jira ticket for the blocked container deployment

data.title: Notify DevOps Team
data.summary: Alert the DevOps and security teams about the blocked deployment

data.title: High Severity Findings?
data.summary: Check if the scan found high-severity vulnerabilities requiring review

data.title: Security Review Required
data.summary: High-severity findings require security team sign-off for deployment

config.description: Require security team approval for images with high-severity vulnerabilities

data.title: Approve for Deployment
data.summary: Image passed the security gate — approve for production promotion

config.note: Container image {{trigger-1.alert.image_name}}:{{trigger-1.alert.image_tag}} passed security gate. No critical or high vulnerabilities detected.

data.title: End
data.summary: Container scan quality gate evaluation complete

config.summary: Container image security gate evaluation complete.
